title: LRU Cache
description:
Design a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache with capacity `capacity`. Implement
`LRUCache(capacity)`, `get(key)` (returns the value or `-1`), and `put(key,
value)`. Both operations must run in O(1) average time; when the cache is full,
`put` evicts the least recently used key.
constraints: At most 2 * 10^5 calls to get and put.

solutions.summary: An insertion-ordered map makes "least recently used" the first key; re-insert on access.

steps.title: Use insertion order to track recency
steps.explanation: On `get`, delete and re-insert the key so it becomes most-recent. On `put` over capacity, evict the first (oldest) key.
